gameTitle: Toy Story 2: Buzz Lightyear to the Rescue!

achievements.title: Andy's House
achievements.description: Collect all Pizza Planet Tokens in Andy's House
achievements.author: mario2188

achievements.title: Andy's House - Coin
achievements.description: Collect 90 coins in Andy's House
achievements.author: mario2188

achievements.title: Andy's House - Boss
achievements.description: Defeat the Tin Robot using only the uncharged laser without missing a shot and without taking damage
achievements.author: mario2188

achievements.title: Andy's House - Upgrade
achievements.description: Obtain the Cosmic Shield in Andy's House
achievements.author: mario2188

achievements.title: Andy's House - Extra Life
achievements.description: Collect all extra lives in Andy's House
achievements.author: mario2188

achievements.title: Andy's House - Challenge I
achievements.description: Get the token in the basement of Andy's House before obtaining the Cosmic Shield
achievements.author: mario2188

achievements.title: Andy's House - Challenge II
achievements.description: Collect the sheep in the basement of Andy's House without using the rope
achievements.author: mario2188

achievements.title: Andy's House - Challenge III
achievements.description: Find the sheep at the wall shelves in Andy's House without using the armchair
achievements.author: mario2188

achievements.description: Defeat the Zurg Kite without spinning and without taking damage

achievements.title: Andy's Neighborhood - Extra Life
achievements.description: Collect all extra lives in Andy's Neighborhood

achievements.title: Andy's Neighborhood - Challenge I
achievements.description: Win the race in Andy's Neighborhood before obtaining the Rocket Boots

achievements.title: Andy's Neighborhood - Challenge II
achievements.description: Collect the token above the swimming pool in Andy's Neighborhood without inflating the rubber duck
achievements.author: mario2188

achievements.title: Andy's Neighborhood - Challenge III
achievements.description: Dive into the pool from the highest branch of the big tree in Andy's Neighborhood

achievements.title: Bombs Away!
achievements.description: Defeat the Bomber Airplane

achievements.description: Defeat the Bomber Airplane using only the uncharged laser without jumping and without taking damage

achievements.title: Bombs Away! - Challenge II
achievements.description: Defeat the Bomber Airplane without using aiming mode

achievements.description: Defeat the Jackhammer without falling down from the arena or taking damage

achievements.description: Obtain the Disk Launcher in Construction Yard

achievements.description: Collect both extra lives in Construction Yard
achievements.author: mario2188

achievements.title: Construction Yard - Challenge I
achievements.description: Find 5 wrenches with 25 seconds or more left on the clock in Construction Yard

achievements.title: Construction Yard - Challenge II
achievements.description: Reach the boss arena in Construction Yard without activating the shortcut or using the bulldozer, and without taking damage

achievements.description: Complete the paint puzzle in Construction Yard with the minimum amount of mixing needed

achievements.title: Alleys and Gullies - Extra Life
achievements.description: Collect all extra lives in Alleys and Gullies
achievements.author: mario2188

achievements.title: Alleys and Gullies - Challenge I
achievements.description: Get the token from the marketplace in Alleys and Gullies without activating the balloon switch
achievements.author: mario2188

achievements.title: Alleys and Gullies - Challenge II
achievements.description: Find 5 bones with 16 seconds or more left on the clock in Alleys and Gullies

achievements.description: Defeat the Slime Monster

achievements.description: Defeat the Slime Monster without picking up the rapid fire laser and without taking damage

achievements.description: Reflect the Slime Monster's projectiles 25 times in a row

achievements.description: Collect the extra life in Al's Toy Barn

achievements.description: Defeat the Toy Dinosaur using only disks without running out of them, and without taking damage

achievements.title: Al's Toy Barn - Upgrade
achievements.description: Obtain the Rocket Boots in Al's Toy Barn

achievements.description: Find the chick on the gum machine in Al's Toy Barn before obtaining the Rocket Boots

achievements.title: Al's Toy Barn - Challenge II
achievements.description: Find the chick from the hatched egg in Al's Toy Barn with 32 seconds or more left on the clock

achievements.description: In Al's Toy Barn, start from the basketball section and reach the air ventilation tube without taking damage

achievements.description: Pass through the laser section in Al's Space Land without taking damage, starting from the platform with the Cosmic Shield

achievements.description: Defeat the Mothership

achievements.description: Defeat the Mothership using only the uncharged laser and without taking damage

achievements.title: Toy Barn Encounter - Challenge II
achievements.description: Defeat the Mothership without shooting

achievements.description: Obtain the Grappling Hook in Elevator Hop

achievements.description: Find the little rat in Elevator Hop starting from the dry ground using only one electric pole to reach it

achievements.description: Activate the first vent shortcut in Elevator Hop within 2 minutes and 10 seconds of entering the level

achievements.description: Find 5 weights with 28 seconds or more left on the clock in Airport Infiltration
